summary.zh-CN: 专辑现在可以选择开启 quick follow-up。开启后，曲师可在非修订阶段上传新的源音频作为待审批申请，主催或相关母带师审批后再替换当前源文件并返回指定流程阶段。
summary.en: Albums can now opt in to quick follow-up. When enabled, composers can upload a pending source file outside revision stages, and the producer or relevant mastering engineer can approve it before it replaces the current source and returns the track to a selected workflow stage.

title.zh-CN: 曲师可提交待审批源音频
title.en: Composers can submit pending source audio

description.zh-CN: 专辑设置新增源音频补交开关。开启后，曲师可在曲目详情页上传新的源文件并填写原因；审批前曲目会进入待处理状态，常规流程操作暂时暂停。
description.en: Album settings now include a source follow-up switch. Once enabled, composers can upload a new source file and reason from track detail; while it is pending, the track enters a paused follow-up state.

description.zh-CN: 主催可批准并选择返回到首个母带交付前的阶段；母带师只能批准到母带相关阶段。批准后新源文件立即成为当前版本，旧母带不再作为当前交付物。
description.en: Producers can approve and choose a stage at or before the first delivery step, while mastering engineers can approve only mastering-related targets. Approval immediately makes the uploaded source current, and older masters stop counting as the current delivery.

title.zh-CN: 阶段转换不再自动结案待讨论问题
title.en: Pending-discussion issues stay pending across stage changes

description.zh-CN: 流程进入下一阶段或修订阶段时，待讨论问题会继续保持待讨论状态，不再自动转为内部结案，便于评审组后续发布、处理或继续讨论。
description.en: When a workflow advances or enters revision, pending-discussion issues now remain pending instead of being automatically marked internally resolved, so reviewers can publish, resolve, or continue discussing them later.
